description: Extract application and operation.type from span.kind for efficient querying

script.description: Split span.kind on '.' to extract application and operation.type
script.source: if (ctx.span != null && ctx.span.kind != null) { String kind = ctx.span.kind.toString(); String[] parts = kind.splitOnToken('.'); if (parts.length >= 2) { ctx.application = parts[0].toLowerCase(); if (ctx.operation == null) { ctx.operation = new HashMap(); } ctx.operation.type = parts[1]; } }
